_comment: Phase 6 MCP server registry. Phase 6a wired bd-mcp (J29). Phase 6b activates code-context (J30, simpler search-based variant) and replaces the previous _phase6_codebase_graph_target placeholder. The placeholder block is preserved as _phase7_codebase_graph_target as a forward pointer to the optional tree-sitter upgrade described in the v3 plan; it is inert until Phase 7+.

_phase7_codebase_graph_target._note: Forward pointer to a tree-sitter-grade replacement for code-context. See .claude/mcp/code-context-mcp/README.md 'Limits / non-goals' for migration notes. Inert.
